title: And Xi Said Behold Thy Many New Industrial Production Records
section_path: And Xi Said Behold Thy Many New Industrial Production Records
section_path_text: And Xi Said Behold Thy Many New Industrial Production Records
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we have been examining in our Weekly China Reports since last year, the Chinese economy has continued to emerge from the pandemic with a stronger economy. Newly released December data has continued to confirm such strength. China's overall industrial production in December rose year-on-year by 7.3%, which marked the largest growth seen throughout 2020.
